mapper.select: SELECT * FROM emp e left outer join dept d on e.dept_num = d.dept_num where emp_num = #{ emp_num }
SELECT e.e_level, d.dept_name FROM emp e LEFT OUTER JOIN dept d ON e.dept_num = d.dept_num WHERE e."E_LEVEL" > 2
mapper.update:
UPDATE emp
dept_num = #{dept_num},
e_level = #{e_level},
WHERE emp_num = #{emp_num}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emp ( EMP_NUM, ENAME, PW, E_LEVEL, TEL, HIRE_DATE, STATUS, SECRET, DEPT_NUM ) VALUES ( EMP_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{ename}, #{pw}, #{e_level}, #{tel}, SYSDATE, 'Y', #{secret}, #{dept_num} )
mapper.select: SELECT distinct e_level FROM emp e left outer join dept d on e.dept_num = d.dept_num
SELECT * FROM emp e left outer join dept d on e.dept_num = d.dept_num order by emp_num desc
